meaning: n.信任,信心,依靠,依靠的人或物
examples: People learned self-reliance because they had to.
Heavy reliance on one client is risky when you are building up a business.
About 10% of Japanese teenagers are overweight. Nutritionists say the main culprit is increasing reliance on Western fast food.
So far, at least, Packard has been able to convert them to his gospel of self-reliance and penny-pinching.
Consultants are very skilled at nurturing this heavy reliance and work diligently to deepen it.
